cit.basis: Two-band progressive CIT: 10% on annual taxable income up to MNT 6,000,000,000; 25% on the portion of taxable income above MNT 6,000,000,000.
cit.note: Administered by the General Department of Taxation (GDT/MTA). AI-estimated; verify against official guidance.

vat.note: Value Added Tax levied at 10% on taxable supplies of goods and services.

wht.note: Withholding tax on certain payments to non-residents (AI-estimated; verify).

personal_income_tax.note: Individual income tax broadly at 10% (progressive elements may apply).

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated rates and thresholds. NOT verified against official primary sources. Must be validated against General Department of Taxation guidance (https://mta.mn/) and a local tax advisor before filing or production use.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are AI-estimated and simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Progressive bands, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
